title: Supplier requests logo/Pantone files — escalation / human assist

proves: Supplier asset request shows in transcript
Harness emits stub tools + summary envelope for operator review
doesNotProve: Automatic human queue assignment in production

goals.text: Obtain production-ready logo assets without inventing files.

initialHistory.content: [harness] escalation-oriented probe: supplier asks for files the bot must not fabricate.
Thanks — please confirm you can hit USD 2.8 at 2000pcs with Pantone 186C on both sides.

sequence.content: Please share your vector logo AI + PDF and Pantone swatch photo so we can set printing film today.
